headline: X says top accounts steal videos from other users as it announces new video tools
summary: X acknowledges that many top accounts steal videos from other users. Video content makes up nearly half of all impressions on the platform. X is launching new video tools to address these issues.

headline: The ‘G-Wagen of golf carts’ could be the ideal second car
summary: Amble, a Lisbon startup, has introduced an electric buggy. Dubbed the 'G-Wagen of golf carts,' it offers a unique design. This EV prioritizes style and utility over speed or advanced features.

headline: ABC tells the government to get out of its newsrooms
summary: ABC is criticizing the FCC for investigating 'The View's' political coverage. The network argues these actions threaten editorial independence. ABC claims the FCC is targeting programs perceived as unfriendly to the administration.

headline: Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
summary: Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI platform is now available on mobile and web. This expanded access rolls out first to Max subscribers. Previously, Claude Cowork was only accessible via desktop apps.

headline: Bluetti AC70 768Wh 1,000W LiFePO4 Power Station Drops Below $250
summary: The Bluetti AC70 power station is now available for under $250. This deal marks its lowest price of the year, surpassing Prime Day offers. It features a 768Wh capacity, 1000W output, and a 5-year warranty.

headline: Walmart Has a Decent 512GB Nintendo Switch 2 Memory Card Deal
summary: Walmart is offering a notable deal on a 512GB memory card. This deal is significant despite recent price increases for storage. It's an essential purchase for expanding future Nintendo Switch 2 storage.

headline: Preorder SPECS, Snap's First Ever AR Glasses
summary: Snap has unveiled its first-ever AR glasses, named SPECS. The new wearable computer is described as lightweight and stylish. Preorders for SPECS are now officially open.

headline: Save 36% Off TP-Link Deco 7 Pro Wi-Fi 7 Whole Home Mesh System
summary: The TP-Link Deco 7 Pro Wi-Fi 7 Mesh System is currently 36% off. This whole-home mesh system is Amazon's best-selling Wi-Fi 7 router. It offers advanced connectivity for extensive home networks.

headline: Farage resigns as MP, vows to fight by-election amid finances row
summary: Nigel Farage has resigned from his position as an MP. He has announced his intention to contest the upcoming by-election. His resignation comes amidst a controversy concerning his personal finances.

headline: Chris Mason: Farage attempts to seize back the agenda
summary: Nigel Farage is strategically working to regain control of the political narrative. He plans to frame the upcoming by-election as a conflict between 'the people versus the establishment.' This move follows his recent resignation and aims to energize his base.

headline: Prince Harry loses High Court privacy case against Daily Mail publisher
summary: Prince Harry has lost his High Court privacy case. The lawsuit was brought against the publisher of the Daily Mail. The judge ruled that the claims of unlawful information gathering were unproven.

headline: Trump looms large as Nato grapples with challenge of rearming Europe
summary: Nato is confronting the significant challenge of rearming Europe. Donald Trump's inflammatory remarks are casting a shadow over the alliance. His words have disrupted the image of unity at a crucial Nato gathering.
